{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Jumbo Health and Wellness Limited (Jumbo Sports) is a leading Nigerian provider of fitness, sports, and wellness solutions. Since 1998, we have specialized in the supply, installation, and maintenance of premium gym equipment, sports equipment, wellness products, and related solutions for individuals, corporate organizations, hospitality businesses, educational institutions, and government agencies. With a commitment to quality, innovation, and exceptional customer service, we help our clients create healthier and more active lifestyles. At Jumbo Sports, we are passionate about developing talented professionals and fostering a collaborative, performance-driven workplace where employees can grow and make meaningful contributions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos

Role Overview


	We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Account Officer to support our day-to-day financial operations.
	The ideal candidate will ensure accurate transaction processing, proper documentation, and strong financial discipline across the business.


Key Responsibilities


	Record daily financial transactions (sales, expenses, payments).
	Maintain accurate general ledger and cashbook records.
	Manage accounts receivable and follow up on outstanding payments.
	Process vendor payments with appropriate approvals.
	Perform bank, POS, and cash reconciliations.
	Support inventory tracking and stock reconciliation.
	Maintain proper documentation for all financial transactions.
	Assist with tax schedules and compliance processes.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Accounting or related fields
	2 &ndash; 5 years of relevant experience.
	Working knowledge of accounting software (Sage, QuickBooks, Zoho, etc.).
	Basic to intermediate Excel skills.
	ACA (in view or started) is an added advantage.


Key Competencies:


	High attention to detail and accuracy.
	Strong organizational skills.
	Integrity and accountability.
	Ability to meet deadlines and follow processes.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: hrjumbo97@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

Account Officer Job at Jumbo Health and Wellness Limited




        
    

        
        Jumbo Health and Wellness Limited (Jumbo Sports) is a leading Nigerian provider of fitness, sports, and wellness solutions. Since 1998, we have specialized in the supply, installation, and maintenance of premium gym equipment, sports equipment, wellness products, and related solutions for individuals, corporate organizations, hospitality businesses, educational institutions, and government agencies. With a commitment to quality, innovation, and exceptional customer service, we help our clients create healthier and more active lifestyles. At Jumbo Sports, we are passionate about developing talented professionals and fostering a collaborative, performance-driven workplace where employees can grow and make meaningful contributions.
     

            
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos

Role Overview


	We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Account Officer to support our day-to-day financial operations.
	The ideal candidate will ensure accurate transaction processing, proper documentation, and strong financial discipline across the business.


Key Responsibilities


	Record daily financial transactions (sales, expenses, payments).
	Maintain accurate general ledger and cashbook records.
	Manage accounts receivable and follow up on outstanding payments.
	Process vendor payments with appropriate approvals.
	Perform bank, POS, and cash reconciliations.
	Support inventory tracking and stock reconciliation.
	Maintain proper documentation for all financial transactions.
	Assist with tax schedules and compliance processes.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Accounting or related fields
	2 – 5 years of relevant experience.
	Working knowledge of accounting software (Sage, QuickBooks, Zoho, etc.).
	Basic to intermediate Excel skills.
	ACA (in view or started) is an added advantage.


Key Competencies:


	High attention to detail and accuracy.
	Strong organizational skills.
	Integrity and accountability.
	Ability to meet deadlines and follow processes.
	Good communication and teamwork skills.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their updated CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory / Cost Control Manager",
  "description": "At Genesis Group, we&#39;ve been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory / Cost Control Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	An Inventory / Cost Control Manager oversees stock levels, manages warehousing workflows, and optimizes financial expenses.
	Key tasks include inventory tracking,cost reduction, and data analysis.


Core Responsibilities


	Inventory Oversight: Maintain exact stock records, manage physical cycle counts, and prevent stockouts or overstocking.
	Cost Management: Analyze carrying and procurement costs, reduce waste and shrinkage, and enforce budget targets.
	Supply Chain Collaboration: Coordinate with vendors, review product deliveries, and streamline warehouse operations.
	Reporting: Generate inventory valuation reports, track turnover ratios, and analyze variance metrics.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 10-11 years of experience.


Requirements and Skills:


	Technical Skills: Advanced spreadsheet proficiency (Excel) and enterprise software experience (ERP/WMS).
	Competencies: Strong analytical mind, meticulous attention to detail, and solid vendor negotiation abilities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: vacancies@genesisgroupng.com using Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Inventory / Cost Control Manager Job at Genesis Group




        
    

        
        At Genesis Group, we've been living our dreams and redefining the world of hospitality for over three decades. Our journey has been characterized by excellence in a wide range of services, including Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, and Cinemas. With a team of over 10,000 dedicated professionals and 30 locations spanning across Nigeria and beyond, we take pride in delivering exceptional experiences to our valued customers.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory / Cost Control Manager

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	An Inventory / Cost Control Manager oversees stock levels, manages warehousing workflows, and optimizes financial expenses.
	Key tasks include inventory tracking,cost reduction, and data analysis.


Core Responsibilities


	Inventory Oversight: Maintain exact stock records, manage physical cycle counts, and prevent stockouts or overstocking.
	Cost Management: Analyze carrying and procurement costs, reduce waste and shrinkage, and enforce budget targets.
	Supply Chain Collaboration: Coordinate with vendors, review product deliveries, and streamline warehouse operations.
	Reporting: Generate inventory valuation reports, track turnover ratios, and analyze variance metrics.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 10-11 years of experience.


Requirements and Skills:


	Technical Skills: Advanced spreadsheet proficiency (Excel) and enterprise software experience (ERP/WMS).
	Competencies: Strong analytical mind, meticulous attention to detail, and solid vendor negotiation abilities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Espritsor is an HR and&nbsp;recruitment service company duly registered with CAC.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Telemarketer
Job Location: Jabi, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are seeking exceptionally articulate, highly persuasive, and results-driven Telemarketers to join our growing real estate firm.
	In this role, you will serve as the primary voice of our brand, engaging potential high-net-worth clients, qualifying leads, and driving interest in premier residential and commercial properties.
	This position demands an uncompromising standard of verbal clarity, professional poise, and superior closing ability.
	If you possess a naturally command-worthy voice and a strong track record of influencing decision-makers over the phone, we invite you to apply.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead Generation &amp; Outreach: Outbound calling to high-value prospective clients, investors, and leads to introduce featured property portfolios.
	Client Engagement &amp; Pitching: Present real estate opportunities clearly, articulately, and compellingly to build immediate rapport and interest.
	Objection Handling: Confidently navigate client inquiries, address reservations, and turn cold or neutral leads into qualified prospects.
	Appointment Scheduling: Secure qualified consultation appointments and site visits for our Senior Real Estate Consultants.
	CRM &amp; Reporting: Maintain precise, up-to-date records of call interactions, lead status, and follow-up schedules within the database.


Candidate Requirements
To be considered for this role, candidates must meet the following criteria:


	B.Sc. Degree&nbsp; / HND / OND in any field (mass communication preferred)
	Exceptional Vocal Clarity: A naturally clear, well-articulated, polished, and pleasant vocal cadence suitable for engaging corporate and high-value clientele.
	Persuasive Mastery: Outstanding negotiation, pitching, and persuasive skills with a proven ability to capture attention and convert conversations into action.
	Real Estate / Sales Insight: Prior experience in cold calling, telesales, or high-end real estate sales is strongly preferred.
	Professional Resilience: Firm, confident, and target-driven demeanor with high emotional intelligence and active listening skills.
	Communication Standards: Impeccable command of spoken and written English
	Cadidate must reside around Jabi, Gwarimpa, jahi, Ukako or Kado


What We Offer


	Competitive base salary with an attractive, performance-based commission structure.
	Comprehensive real estate product and pitch training.
	Structured path for professional growth and leadership opportunities within the firm.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV alongside a 1-minute voice recording introducing themselves and briefly pitching a property or professional service to: hr.mosaichomes@gmail.com using &quot;Professional Telemarketer &ndash; [Your Full Name]&quot; as the subject of the email.

Note: Submissions without a clear voice recording sample will not be evaluated.",

Telemarketer Job at Espritsor Enterprises




        
    

        
        Espritsor is an HR and recruitment service company duly registered with CAC.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Telemarketer
Job Location: Jabi, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

            
    




	We are seeking exceptionally articulate, highly persuasive, and results-driven Telemarketers to join our growing real estate firm.
	In this role, you will serve as the primary voice of our brand, engaging potential high-net-worth clients, qualifying leads, and driving interest in premier residential and commercial properties.
	This position demands an uncompromising standard of verbal clarity, professional poise, and superior closing ability.
	If you possess a naturally command-worthy voice and a strong track record of influencing decision-makers over the phone, we invite you to apply.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead Generation & Outreach: Outbound calling to high-value prospective clients, investors, and leads to introduce featured property portfolios.
	Client Engagement & Pitching: Present real estate opportunities clearly, articulately, and compellingly to build immediate rapport and interest.
	Objection Handling: Confidently navigate client inquiries, address reservations, and turn cold or neutral leads into qualified prospects.
	Appointment Scheduling: Secure qualified consultation appointments and site visits for our Senior Real Estate Consultants.
	CRM & Reporting: Maintain precise, up-to-date records of call interactions, lead status, and follow-up schedules within the database.


Candidate Requirements
To be considered for this role, candidates must meet the following criteria:


	B.Sc. Degree  / HND / OND in any field (mass communication preferred)
	Exceptional Vocal Clarity: A naturally clear, well-articulated, polished, and pleasant vocal cadence suitable for engaging corporate and high-value clientele.
	Persuasive Mastery: Outstanding negotiation, pitching, and persuasive skills with a proven ability to capture attention and convert conversations into action.
	Real Estate / Sales Insight: Prior experience in cold calling, telesales, or high-end real estate sales is strongly preferred.
	Professional Resilience: Firm, confident, and target-driven demeanor with high emotional intelligence and active listening skills.
	Communication Standards: Impeccable command of spoken and written English
	Cadidate must reside around Jabi, Gwarimpa, jahi, Ukako or Kado


What We Offer


	Competitive base salary with an attractive, performance-based commission structure.
	Comprehensive real estate product and pitch training.
	Structured path for professional growth and leadership opportunities within the firm.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV alongside a 1-minute voice recording introducing themselves and briefly pitching a property or professional service to: [email protected] using "Professional Telemarketer – [Your Full Name]" as the subject of the email.

Note: Submissions without a clear voice recording sample will not be evaluated.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Content Creator",
  "description": "Richland Property and Homes Limited - We are committed to making real estate affordable and accessible, making us a true vehicle for property acquisition. Whether buying your first plot or more plots, you can count on our expertise, integrity, and deep understanding of the space.

We are&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location: Lagos (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Richland Property and Homes is seeking a creative and talented Content Creator to produce engaging visual and written content that showcases our properties, strengthens our brand presence, and attracts potential clients.
	The ideal candidate should have a passion for storytelling, photography, videography, and digital content creation, with the ability to create compelling content that highlights our properties and connects with our target audience across different digital platforms.
	The successful candidate will work closely with the Social Media Manager and Sales team to develop content that increases brand awareness, promotes property listings, and supports&nbsp;business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Create high-quality content including property videos, walkthroughs, reels, photos, graphics, and promotional materials.
	Visit property locations to capture engaging photos and videos for marketing purposes.
	Develop creative concepts and content ideas that showcase properties and the company&#39;s brand.
	Produce short-form videos suitable for platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube.
	Edit videos, images, and graphics to create professional and engaging content.
	Collaborate with the Social Media Manager to develop content plans and campaigns.
	Create content for property launches, inspections, client testimonials, company events, and promotional activities.
	Ensure all content aligns with the company&#39;s brand identity, tone, and marketing objectives.
	Stay updated on current social media trends, content formats, and creative techniques.
	Maintain an organized library of photos, videos, and other content assets.
	Support the marketing team with creative materials for campaigns and property promotions.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in content creation, photography, videography, or a related role.
	Strong portfolio demonstrating previous content creation work.
	Experience creating short-form videos, reels, and social media content.
	Proficiency in video editing tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or similar software.
	Proficiency in Canva or other graphic design tools.
	Good photography and videography skills.
	Creative mindset with strong attention to detail.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
	Experience creating content for real estate, lifestyle, or related industries is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio (links to previous content, social media pages managed, videos, or creative projects), to: hr@richlandproperty.com.ng using &quot;Content Creator &ndash; Real Estate&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Content Creator Job at Richland Property and Homes Limited




        
    

        
        Richland Property and Homes Limited - We are committed to making real estate affordable and accessible, making us a true vehicle for property acquisition. Whether buying your first plot or more plots, you can count on our expertise, integrity, and deep understanding of the space.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Content Creator

Job Location: Lagos (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	Richland Property and Homes is seeking a creative and talented Content Creator to produce engaging visual and written content that showcases our properties, strengthens our brand presence, and attracts potential clients.
	The ideal candidate should have a passion for storytelling, photography, videography, and digital content creation, with the ability to create compelling content that highlights our properties and connects with our target audience across different digital platforms.
	The successful candidate will work closely with the Social Media Manager and Sales team to develop content that increases brand awareness, promotes property listings, and supports business growth.


Key Responsibilities


	Create high-quality content including property videos, walkthroughs, reels, photos, graphics, and promotional materials.
	Visit property locations to capture engaging photos and videos for marketing purposes.
	Develop creative concepts and content ideas that showcase properties and the company's brand.
	Produce short-form videos suitable for platforms such as Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and YouTube.
	Edit videos, images, and graphics to create professional and engaging content.
	Collaborate with the Social Media Manager to develop content plans and campaigns.
	Create content for property launches, inspections, client testimonials, company events, and promotional activities.
	Ensure all content aligns with the company's brand identity, tone, and marketing objectives.
	Stay updated on current social media trends, content formats, and creative techniques.
	Maintain an organized library of photos, videos, and other content assets.
	Support the marketing team with creative materials for campaigns and property promotions.


Requirements


	Minimum of 2 years of experience in content creation, photography, videography, or a related role.
	Strong portfolio demonstrating previous content creation work.
	Experience creating short-form videos, reels, and social media content.
	Proficiency in video editing tools such as CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, or similar software.
	Proficiency in Canva or other graphic design tools.
	Good photography and videography skills.
	Creative mindset with strong attention to detail.
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines.
	Experience creating content for real estate, lifestyle, or related industries is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio (links to previous content, social media pages managed, videos, or creative projects), to: [email protected] using "Content Creator – Real Estate" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Executive",
  "description": "Espritsor - Our client, is&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Overview


	Our client is seeking exceptionally polished, high-performing Sales Executives with a proven track record of closing high-value deals in the real estate sector.
	In luxury and high-end real estate, image sells. We require presentable, highly attractive, and articulate professionals who combine a strong physical presence with formidable persuasive power. If you are a target-driven closer who knows how to command attention, build immediate trust, and deliver direct revenue results, we want to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	High-Value Closing: Pitch, negotiate, and close transactions for premium residential and commercial real estate properties.
	Client Relationship Management: Build and manage relationships with high-net-worth individuals, investors, and corporate clients.
	Site Inspections &amp; Presentations: Lead professional, compelling on-site viewings and property presentations.
	Pipeline Management: Proactively source new leads, expand market reach, and consistently meet strict sales targets


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Track Record: Demonstrated, verifiable history of sales success, preferably within real estate or luxury assets.
	Persuasive Power: Exceptional communication, negotiation, and closing abilities with the confidence to influence decision-makers.
	Professional Appearance: Outstanding personal presentation, sharp grooming, and a strong physical presence suitable for representing a premier brand.
	Market Insight: Deep understanding of real estate market dynamics, buyer psychology, and property investment metrics.
	Candidate must reside in or around Jabi, utako, Gwarimpa, kado or Jahi.


Remuneration &amp; Benefits


	Competitive Base Salary; N250,000 per month.
	High-Tier Commission Structure (uncapped earning potential based on performance)
	Performance Bonuses &amp; Incentives
	Professional growth opportunities and access to premium network events.


Method of application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV along with a recent full-length photograph and a brief cover note outlining your track record of sales achievements to hr.mosaichomes@gmail.com using &quot;Application: Real Estate Sales Executive &ndash; [Your Full Name]&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note: Applications without a professional photo and documented sales track record will not be considered.",

Sales Executive Job at Espritsor Enterprises




        
    

        
        Espritsor - Our client, is recruiting to fill the position below:

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Sales Executive

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Overview
     

            
    




	Our client is seeking exceptionally polished, high-performing Sales Executives with a proven track record of closing high-value deals in the real estate sector.
	In luxury and high-end real estate, image sells. We require presentable, highly attractive, and articulate professionals who combine a strong physical presence with formidable persuasive power. If you are a target-driven closer who knows how to command attention, build immediate trust, and deliver direct revenue results, we want to hear from you.


Key Responsibilities


	High-Value Closing: Pitch, negotiate, and close transactions for premium residential and commercial real estate properties.
	Client Relationship Management: Build and manage relationships with high-net-worth individuals, investors, and corporate clients.
	Site Inspections & Presentations: Lead professional, compelling on-site viewings and property presentations.
	Pipeline Management: Proactively source new leads, expand market reach, and consistently meet strict sales targets


Requirements & Qualifications


	Track Record: Demonstrated, verifiable history of sales success, preferably within real estate or luxury assets.
	Persuasive Power: Exceptional communication, negotiation, and closing abilities with the confidence to influence decision-makers.
	Professional Appearance: Outstanding personal presentation, sharp grooming, and a strong physical presence suitable for representing a premier brand.
	Market Insight: Deep understanding of real estate market dynamics, buyer psychology, and property investment metrics.
	Candidate must reside in or around Jabi, utako, Gwarimpa, kado or Jahi.


Remuneration & Benefits


	Competitive Base Salary; N250,000 per month.
	High-Tier Commission Structure (uncapped earning potential based on performance)
	Performance Bonuses & Incentives
	Professional growth opportunities and access to premium network events.


Method of application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV along with a recent full-length photograph and a brief cover note outlining your track record of sales achievements to [email protected] using "Application: Real Estate Sales Executive – [Your Full Name]" as the subject of the mail.

Note: Applications without a professional photo and documented sales track record will not be considered.
